evals.prompt: I just cloned xuanwu and npm install failed under apps/desktop. What should I run instead and from where?
evals.expected_output: pnpm install from monorepo root; only-allow pnpm; avoid npm in that tree.

evals.prompt: Add dependency ansi-colors to the desktop Tauri app only—give the exact pnpm command.
evals.expected_output: pnpm add ansi-colors --filter desktop (or equivalent filter naming matching the workspace).
